caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ICY NEVADA" and "SHIT" printed on the front is speaking into a professional microphone. He is seated in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. Clothing racks and other store fixtures are visible behind him. In his hand, he holds a red cup. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left that reads "BORN REAL" and one on the right that reads "BORN REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and shifts his gaze, eventually closing his eyes as he continues to talk into the microphone. The background remains static while the man's facial expressions and head movements change as he talks.
